summary: Iteration 16 — Phase 2 refactor validation. Verified Rinkosh backend service-layer extraction (services/credit_bureau.py, services/account_aggregator.py, services/recommendation.py, seed_data.py) plus 6 new HTTP endpoints (credit-score + Account Aggregator flow). Ran existing 7 unit tests in tests/test_services_refactor.py: ALL PASS. Authored and ran new pytest integration suite tests/test_rinkosh_iteration16.py (11 tests covering regression + new endpoints + auth + audit): ALL 11 PASS. Frontend regression spot-check on the refactored LandingPage (138-line orchestrator + 7 sub-components): sticky navbar present, hero-compare-btn solid navy rgb(13,27,42), Browse Loans section rendering all 72 products, EMI calc section present, founder/trust/3-col grid intact, EN/HI toggle visible. No bugs found in the refactor.
passed_tests: Unit (7): get_credit_provider factory→mock, deterministic mock score 600-879 in band+recos, AA full flow request→approve→fetch, approval high-score boost, approval low-credit/EMI penalty, corporate tie-up boost, score clamp ≤95
Integration (11): /api/loans/products returns 72 products with required fields
PUT /api/user/profile + GET /api/loans/recommendations returns ranked items with approval_probability/score (regression of extracted services/recommendation.py)
GET /api/credit-score/check returns score 300-900, band ∈ {Poor,Fair,Good,Very Good,Excellent}, recommendations[]≥1, is_mock=true, provider=mock, bureau=CIBIL
GET /api/credit-score/report returns the cached report after a check
POST /api/aa/consent/request → consent_handle starts with 'chdl_', status=PENDING, redirect_url present
GET /api/aa/consent/status/{handle} → mock auto-approves: status=APPROVED, consent_id starts with 'cnst_'
POST /api/aa/fi-data/fetch → FIDataPacket with fi_data.summary.avg_monthly_balance>0, salary_credits_last_3mo present, is_mock=true
POST /api/aa/consent/revoke → 200; subsequent status check shows REVOKED (DB persisted)
All 4 AA endpoints + credit-score reject unauthenticated requests with 401
Audit log via GET /api/admin/audit-logs contains all 4 new actions: credit_score_fetched, aa_consent_requested, aa_fi_data_fetched, aa_consent_revoked

Frontend regression (Playwright spot-check): sticky navbar, hero-compare-btn solid navy rgb(13,27,42), browse-loans section renders 72 loan cards, EMI calculator section present, grid-cols-3 trust block intact, EN/HI language toggle visible
critical_code_review_comments: services/account_aggregator.py:135 — `MockAAProvider._store: dict = {}` is a CLASS attribute (shared across instances and survives across requests in this single-process FastAPI server, which is actually required for the polling flow to work). This is fine for mock but worth a comment because every `get_aa_provider()` call constructs a new instance — they intentionally share state via class-level dict. If you ever switch to multi-worker uvicorn (gunicorn -w N) the in-memory store will fragment and `consent_handle not found` will randomly appear in prod. Add a Redis-backed store before scaling out.

services/account_aggregator.py:194 — `epf_balance` is always populated regardless of fi_types because the `if 'EPF' in (consent_id or '') or True` short-circuits to True. Either gate it on the stored fi_types from the consent or remove the dead branch.

server.py is still 1701 lines — extraction was a great start, but routes are still monolithic. Consider extracting routers into /backend/routers/{auth,loans,credit_score,aa,profile,admin}.py for the next refactor pass (server.py becomes a thin app-factory).
/api/credit-score/check has no rate-limit; in prod a CIBIL pull costs ₹4-12 per call. Add per-user throttle (e.g., 1 call / 7 days) before turning on live provider.

AA consent flow does not validate `fi_types` against the standard FI_TYPES dict in account_aggregator.py — a malformed type like 'BANANA' would be accepted and persisted. Add `validate_fi_types()` in AAConsentRequest pydantic model.

POST /api/aa/fi-data/fetch reads JSON body via `await request.json()` instead of a Pydantic model — inconsistent with the rest of the codebase and skips validation. Define `FIDataFetchRequest(BaseModel) { consent_id: str }` and use it.

MockAAProvider.fetch_financial_data does not verify the consent_id was ever issued (just trusts the caller). Server-level check at server.py:832 covers the DB side, but the adapter itself is too permissive — fine for mock, but the FinvuSandboxProvider stub should NOT inherit this leniency.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_rinkosh_iteration16.py (new — 11 integration tests for the new endpoints + regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on spot-checked regression markers (sticky nav, solid navy CTA, 72 loan cards, EMI section, founder/trust layout, EN/HI toggle present)

test_credentials: admin@rinkosh.com / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). New fresh user created per module run: test_iter16_<uuid>@rinkosh.test / TestPass@123.
seed_data_creation: Per pytest module run: 1 fresh user (email test_iter16_<rand>@rinkosh.test), 1 user_profile, 1 credit_report, 1 aa_consents row (auto-approved then revoked), 1 aa_fi_data row, and ~4 audit_log entries. All TEST_ prefixed via random uuid suffix so they're safe to leave or sweep with a `db.users.delete_many({email: /^test_iter16_/})` later.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 — Phase 2 refactor (server.py service extraction + LandingPage component split + Sahamati AA adapter + CIBIL bureau adapter) is fully validated. All 18 tests pass. New regression test file is /app/backend/tests/test_rinkosh_iteration16.py — reuse it for next round. Bank Onboarding/Portal flows were explicitly out-of-scope and not touched (per main agent note). Code-review comments above are non-blocking enhancements (multi-worker state, rate-limit, pydantic validation) — main agent can pick them up in next iteration. Mocked APIs continue to be: /api/credit-score/* (provider=mock), /api/aa/* (provider=mock auto-approves). Toggle to live by setting CREDIT_BUREAU_PROVIDER / AA_PROVIDER env vars and wiring the stub adapters.

mocked_apis.GET /api/credit-score/check: MockCreditBureauProvider — deterministic synthetic score 600-879 based on sha256(user_id)
mocked_apis.GET /api/credit-score/report: Reads the cached mock report from db.credit_reports
mocked_apis.POST /api/aa/consent/request: MockAAProvider — generates chdl_ handle, in-memory store
mocked_apis.GET /api/aa/consent/status/{handle}: MockAAProvider — auto-approves on first poll, issues cnst_ id
mocked_apis.POST /api/aa/fi-data/fetch: MockAAProvider — deterministic synthetic financial summary from sha256(user_id)
mocked_apis.POST /api/aa/consent/revoke: MockAAProvider — flips in-memory + DB row to REVOKED
